Best Cat Food 2026: Top 10 Brands Reviewed

Published on March 2, 2026

⚠️ Affiliate Disclosure: This post may contain affiliate links. We earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.

Quick Summary

After testing 40+ cat food brands, here are our top picks for 2026:

🏆 Top Pick: Smalls Fresh Cat Food

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.9/5

Best for: All life stages, picky eaters

Price: $45 for 12lbs

Our Testing Process

We evaluate cat food based on:

  • Ingredient quality and sourcing
  • Nutritional completeness (AAFCO standards)
  • Customer reviews and feedback
  • Price per serving
  • Palatability (picky eater approval!)

Top 10 Cat Food Brands

1. Smalls Fresh Cat Food - Best Overall

Pros: Fresh human-grade ingredients, high protein, no fillers

Cons: Subscription only, premium price

Check Price →

2. Orijen Cat & Kitten - Best Dry Food

Pros: 85% meat, biologically appropriate, grain-free

Cons: High price point

Check Price on Amazon →

3. Hill’s Science Diet - Best for Senior Cats

Pros: Veterinarian recommended, age-specific formulas

Cons: Contains grains, lower meat content

Check Price on Amazon →

Buyer’s Guide

What to Look for in Cat Food

  • Protein source: Cats are obligate carnivores - need high protein
  • AAFCO statement: Ensures complete nutrition
  • Life stage: Kitten, adult, or senior formulas
  • Wet vs Dry: Wet food provides hydration, dry is convenient

FAQ

Is grain-free better for cats?

Cats don’t need grains, but they’re not harmful unless your cat has an allergy.

How much should I feed my cat?

Follow the feeding guide on the package, adjusted for your cat’s age and activity level.

About PetFoodLab

We independently review pet food and supplements. Our reviews are based on ingredient analysis, customer feedback, and veterinary research.
